overview: Forum Health is a network of integrative and functional medicine clinics that address the root causes of health concerns including weight loss, hormone imbalances, chronic conditions, and anti-aging through personalized treatment plans developed by board-certified specialists.
highlights: Board-certified integrative and functional medicine specialists
Advanced diagnostic testing and data-driven personalized treatment
targetAudience: People seeking functional medicine approaches for chronic conditions, hormonal imbalances, weight management, and preventive wellness optimization.
